title: The augmented LLM: foundation of all agent patterns

body.overview: Every agentic pattern starts from the same primitive: an LLM enhanced with retrieval, tools, and memory. The model actively uses these — generating search queries, selecting tools, deciding what to remember. This augmented LLM is the atom; workflows and agents are molecules built from it.

components.name: Retrieval
components.role: Lets the LLM pull in external knowledge (e.g., vector search, RAG) to ground responses in facts

components.name: Tools
components.role: Lets the LLM take actions — call APIs, run code, query databases

components.name: Memory
components.role: Lets the LLM retain information across steps or sessions

body.flow: User input → LLM decides which augmentations to use → LLM generates search queries / selects tools / stores info → augmentation results feed back into LLM → LLM produces final output
